audit_items.proof_trace: `bid()` calls `_getAssetPrice(asset, true)` at L429; with `withValidation=true`, `_getAssetPrice` (PriceManager.sol L409-414) explicitly reverts via `ZeroFeedData` on zero price and `StaleFeedData` on stale price. The subsequent `_getAssetOutAmount(..., true)` at L442 also passes validation=true for the assetOut price (L798), so both sides of the swap enforce price validity.
